title: Fold Kenyan Bean Salad
description: An earthy, crumbly, energizing kenyan dish featuring dried white navy beans that's perfect for a breakfast or snack, gluten-free-friendly.
instructions: Rinse and soak the beans in water for at least 6 hours, then drain and rinse again.
Combine soaked beans with finely chopped onion, cilantro leaves, minced jalapeno, lime juice, salt, and coconut oil or vegetable oil in a mixing bowl.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 30-45 minutes until the beans are tender and crispy on top, flipping the mixture halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning.
Serve warm as a snack or side dish.
